title: Role-based access control with resource ownership

difficulty.rationale: Requires combining role permissions with per-resource ownership checks and an admin override, plus an exact 401 (unauthenticated) versus 403 (authenticated but forbidden) distinction across four endpoints.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: Missing or unknown token returns 401 unauthorized.
Admin and editor can create documents; viewer cannot.
Editor can update documents they own.
Admin can update or delete any document.
must_not: Allow a viewer to create, update, or delete.
Allow an editor to update a document owned by another user.
Allow a non-admin to delete a document.
Return 403 for an unknown or missing token.
edge_cases: An editor updating another editor's document returns 403.
Editor and viewer deleting any document returns 403.
An unknown token returns 401, distinct from a forbidden 403.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
